description: Create Next.js API route handlers for all 7 Next.js apps that proxy requests to their respective Fastify backends. Each route handler supports the HTTP methods that the hooks require (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE), uses an environment variable for the backend URL, and forwards Authorization headers.
steps: Create apps/quantcalendar/src/app/api/events/route.ts with GET (list/filter events) and POST (create event) handlers proxying to QUANTCALENDAR_BACKEND_URL (default http://localhost:3104). Events endpoint uses searchParams for calendarId, start, end.
Create apps/quantcalendar/src/app/api/calendars/route.ts with GET handler proxying to backend /calendars endpoint.
Create apps/quantdocs/src/app/api/docs/route.ts with GET (list docs with filter/search params) handler.
Create apps/quantdocs/src/app/api/docs/[id]/route.ts with GET (single document by id) handler.
Create apps/quantdrive/src/app/api/files/route.ts with GET (list files by path param) handler.
Create apps/quantdrive/src/app/api/storage/quota/route.ts with GET handler for storage quota.
Create apps/quantai/src/app/api/assistant/chat/route.ts with POST handler for chat messages.
Create apps/quantai/src/app/api/devices/route.ts with GET (list) and POST (register) handlers.
Create apps/quantai/src/app/api/automations/route.ts with GET (list) and POST (create) handlers.
Create apps/quantai/src/app/api/training/route.ts with GET and POST handlers.
Create apps/quantmail/src/app/api/drive/files/route.ts with GET (list files by folderId) handler.
Create apps/quantmail/src/app/api/drive/upload/route.ts with POST (file upload passthrough) handler.
Create apps/quantchat/src/app/api/messages/[id]/route.ts with GET (fetch messages with page/limit) and POST (send message) handlers.
Run pnpm typecheck to verify all routes compile correctly.
Run pnpm build to verify Next.js builds succeed with the new routes.
acceptance_criteria: Every /api/* endpoint referenced in hooks of quantcalendar, quantdocs, quantdrive, quantmeet has a corresponding route.ts file in src/app/api/
Every /api/* endpoint referenced by the quantai apiClient (which uses '/api' as base) has a corresponding route.ts file
Every /api/* endpoint referenced in quantmail useDrive hook has a corresponding route.ts file
Every /api/* endpoint referenced in quantchat useChat and useStories hooks has a corresponding route.ts file
All route handlers use NextRequest/NextResponse from 'next/server'
All route handlers forward Authorization headers to the backend
Backend URLs are configurable via environment variables with sensible defaults
findings: All 51 API route files created across 7 apps. pnpm typecheck passes 109/109, pnpm build passes 87/87. Pre-commit hook (prettier) ran and formatted files successfully. The turbo warnings about no output files for next build tasks are pre-existing and not caused by this change.
